title: Working in our health care system - Canada.ca
content:
## Working in our health care system
Get information on careers and professional development.

## Services and information

### Career and workforce development
Find out about learning and training opportunities in public health as well as internship opportunities for students.

### What we’re doing to support the health workforce
Learn about the actions being taken to address health workforce needs.

### Nursing positions available in First Nations communities
Nursing opportunities in remote or isolated First Nations communities, how to apply.
